changelog.message: Link public teams to my teams and vice versa

changelog.message: Show icon next to op name if op has an example on ops overview page

changelog.message: New concept of "temporary patches" (new empty patches, restored backups, ...) they are listed in tab on "My Patches" page

changelog.message: Cleanup layout of team page and team-overview pages

changelog.message: Disallow deletion of example patches, add warning
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Do not increment export count when creating backup of projects
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Add more information to project log, make log-view collapsable
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Fix duplicate inclusion of op dependencies in export
changelog.author: stephan

changelog.message: Add option to restore backups pointing to original patch assets
